title: BASIC NEEDS - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY LEBANON EXTENSION BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric, water, propane, and rent payment assistance. Also provides gas and bus vouchers to get to medical appointments. 3000 S Santiam Highway Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 10am-2pm. Last appointments seen at 1:30pm. Email (541) 409-5929 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 409-5929 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Leave a voicemail if after hours or no one answers; calls returned during business hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Bring current bills related to financial assistance needed, such as shut off notices, eviction notices, and proof of rental agreement for rent assistance. If applying for gas money, bring proof of doctor appointment or work address as well as proof of car insurance. AREA SERVED: City of Lebanon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Money Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY LEBANON EXTENSION
